raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1645 will address a ban on the use of Hydrofluoric Acid at refineries.",
    "AB 1646 will require a refinery to maintain a publicly accessible risk management plan that includes notification to residents for emergencies.",
    "AB 1647 will require the refinery to install and maintain air quality monitors at both fence-line and in the community.",
    "AB 1647 will require the refinery to publicly report the readings from the air quality monitors in real-time.",
    "AB 1648 will increase the number of refinery inspectors at Cal-OSHA.",
    "AB 1649 will codify the existing Refinery Task Force to ensure its continuation after Governor Brown leaves office in 2018."
  ]
}
```
